title: plectranthus ferrugineus
intro: Plectranthus ferrugineus, also known as the Red-leaved Spur Flower, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Plectranthus ferrugineus can be consumed as a tea, or the plant's essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy.
